title: Proof by Contradiction
description: A failed debunk tells you what the mix is NOT. Use that, plus the assignment and mixing clues, to nail down the answer.

hints.text: The master debunk outcome is 'failure' — that means the actual mix of those two ingredients is NOT the claimed potion. List what it could still be.
The assignment clue pins one ingredient exactly. The mixing clue pins another pair's result. Together they constrain the world significantly.
Once worlds are narrowed, check what mix(2+4) must be in every remaining world.
